creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Tijl, thanks a lot for the feedback! As for the whitespace, I only changed it because portlint insists on tabs, should be easy enough to skip these changes if you don't like them :)
I was just worried there's either something wrong with the patch or the PR went unnoticed in a bursting inbox ;) So thanks for letting me know, of course it makes sense here to await a new version, as this change won't have any benefit before.
BR, Felix
